title: Regarding to furnish requisite data and identification of posts where contractual employees are drawing remuneration exceeding Rs. 50,000/-per month.

Regarding to extend timeline for verification of applications by Drawing and Disbursing Officers (DDOs) on the portal under the Haryana Contractual Employees (Security of Service) Act, 2024 & Rules, 2025.
Filing for annual property return for the year 2025-2026.
